title: Overview
text:
The following website contains an assortment of curated documents from the radio station McCool FM and the mercenary group PUML.
Note the following symbols denote footnotes which are at the bottom of the page: *, ⁂, ◉, ♢, Δ, and then the greek alphabet starting with α and ending with ω.

title: PAAR: SICK
text:
MISSION  STEAL INTERESTING SCHEMATICS FROM KRAKEN
MISSION LOCATION 
MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED 
CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE 
REMARKS 
MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS  ████████████████████ - TRASHED PAND - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - ECHOED SNAIL - ACTIVE 
SICK: Steal Interesting sChematics from Kraken Gaian forces want schematics for a new solar panel technology. These are being held by the energy company “Kraken” run by the CEO “Marian Dullcoin”, an elder dotter of Tartarus. Extract this from their R&D facility in their private industrial estate on the Spanish island of Mallorca.
Extraction on small island Cabrera.
Reward: The plasma cutter pistol is being developed at the industrial estate. If it is stolen and the schematics successfully stolen and given to the Gaia forces they will finish it. This will repair and remove the Unfinished weapon trait.
Plasma cutter (1D6+2 DAMAGE) ROCKCUTTER: Makes clean line cuts that can go through flesh, bone, and rock. Purpose made to not damage gems and metals. Side effect is that it cannot damage plant based materials. UNFINISHED: When fired, roll a D6. If your roll is equal to or less than the number of times you have used the weapon it fails and will no longer work till repaired and finished.
Industrial estate Reception building Office building with worker recreation RnD buildings Renewables: Facility looking into renewables. Favors geothermal energy. Has schematics. Mining: Research projects into improving mining. Has plasma cutter Generators: Large rooms with electricity generator prototypes. Oil: Petroleum chemistry research. Defenses Pairs of Kraken security guards High walls with barbed wire around perimeter Guard towers that move around on tracks around the perimeter, within the walls. Each tower has a search light and 2 tower guards [3HP, 1 ARMOR, semi-automatic rifle 1D6+1 DAMAGE] If high alert contractor will be sent out, 2 contractor per SUV Kraken private contractor SUV Suggested ways of infiltration Gaian spy acting as janitor Bar that employees go to after work called “Si senor”.

title: The Primeval Deities and you: ep4 Proteus

title: McCool People: Dr. Rangi Doshi
text: McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Dr. Rangi Doshi, 17th March 1990, 11.00 a.m.

title: McCool People: Pat
text:
McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Pat, 17th June 1990, 11.00 a.m.
Maggie McCool: Good morning to you all on this lovely June morning. Today on McCool people I, Maggie McCool, am joined by Pat. Good morning Pat or can I call you Paddy?
Pat: Good morning to yourself. Paddy’s me personal name but for business it’s Pat. How are you doing?
MM: I’m grand, and yourself?
P: Grand, can’t complain.
MM: Brilliant. Some of our listeners may have heard of you but can you please tell us about yourself.
P: Gladly, I’m Pat of PUML. That stands for Pat’s Undisclosed Mercenary League. I run a mercenary group of gifted individuals. I’m here to promote our business and to announce that we are hiring.
MM: That must be a very interesting job but surely it is dangerous. Why would people want to join?
P: Well, I can’t guarantee that you’ll be loaded but you will be free to do what you want to do. If you’re primal and don’t join us the government may very well recruit you, imprison you, or experiment on you.
MM: Primal?
P: Sorry, in military speak Primal refers to those with gifts or powers from one of the Primeval Deities. I’ve seen people breathe fire like a dragon, float in the air like a jellyfish, and even someone grow back one of their two heads. Yes the job is dangerous but you can die a free and exciting death with us or live a dull imprisoned life with the government.
MM: Do you go on missions?
P: Those days are behind me now. I’m a family man and decided to take care of me daughter. I’m what’s called a handler now. I vet our clients and missions making sure I assign suitable mercs to the jobs. We only take jobs that we think will help people. Our clientele has included corporations, governments, individuals, and charities.
MM: Charities? Why would they need to hire mercenaries?
P: Sometimes they provide aid to war torn areas and we’ll be their protection detail.
MM: Fascinating. It sounds like you want to try to make the world a better place. Why is that?
P: I was just a soldier. I thought it would be an easy job with the world being at peace. Through that I found war all across the world, minor ones but any could start another world war. Truthfully that didn’t change me. I fell in love and had a daughter with me wife. So I want to make the world better for her.
MM: Well your wife is certainly lucky to have a catch of a man like yourself.
P: She’s unfortunately no longer with us. Not for a while now.
MM: I’m so sorry.
MM: On another note, what do you think of the Blondie and Scaly-man-thing-guy franchise?
P: It’s great fun and I’m looking forward to finally seeing the Cockroach Empress. Though, I wasn’t sure about the 2 becoming accountants in the fifth film.
MM: It’s not the best film but it does contain some vital lore in the post credits scene. It really changed how I saw some of their previous interactions.
P: It beats the film where they fight the hat wearing dinosaurs from the centre of Mars.
MM: Who thought a mid film genre switch into a court drama about space trade was a good idea?
[Laughing in unison]
[end of except]

title: The Primeval Deities and you: ep8 Primality
text:
Hello listener and welcome to the eighth episode of The Primeval Deities and you. I am Dr. Harmon Atriti, lecturer of Primeval studies at The University of Cambridge, and your eager host.
Recently the term Primal humans has gained widespread adoption around the world. This refers to humans who have been gifted special powers from one of the Primeval Deities.
However, it is not just humans who can have these powers. All entities, all objects, and even forces can be bestowed with these traits. In academic circles we call this effect divinity or primevality. But I now choose to introduce the term Primality. I hope you will help in the worldwide adoption of this new term.
But what is primality? We deem something to be primal or have primality if we can not explain a phenomena with science. These can be as boring as rocks rolling up a specific hill to more dangerous affairs such as the Kaiju of Japan. However they can also be helpful. There are areas where wind always blows, making perfect locations for wind farms. Ultimately the primality of forces and weather are very much up to debate. It can be hard to determine what is a natural or primal phenomena when we do not fully understand either. However, it is my theory that our world is so intrinsically entangled with the Primeval deities that once folklore could be explained with science now science can be explained by the Primeval deities. If only we could directly communicate to them.
This brings us onto Primal humans. You may be wondering how we know so much about The Primeval deities when we can’t communicate with them. Much of what we know is inferred but some have spoken with them. Primal humans have a connection to a deity allowing limited communication.THrough this they have been assigned personalities that we can understand. Of course this is but the surface. Primal humans will have powers. A Dotter may have such string teeth they can east metal. A Gaian may be able to control the microbes in their body. A Protean may grow gills. A Sun may even be able to see the future. These sound crazy but are indeed real life examples.
crumbs: The Primeval Deities and you: ep8 Primality

title: Commercial: Si señor
text:
1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

SEÑOR: Is Si señor coming to a town near you? Si señor! Come to our world renowned bar where we always answer with, Si señor!
SEÑOR: Are you tired of people saying no? No señor, you can’t start a pub. No, señor, you can’t drink 1 litre of tequila. No señor, you are too drunk to drive.
SEÑOR: At Si señor we change those to: Si señor, congratulations on your successful bars. Si señor, here’s your first shot. y Si señor, we’ll get you a cab home.
SEÑOR: Whether you want beer, cider, wine, or tequila. Nachos, tacos, or churros. At Si señor we’re ready with a smile and a… now say it with me… Si señor!

title: PuMP: FLUSTERED TURKEY
text:
BACKGROUND  A test subject of an illegal Centre for Genomic Cloning (CGC) lab hybridising humans and animals. She was rescued in 1988 by The Arrows of Gaia (TAG), an eco warrior group. TAG reported decapitating Dr. Petra Pufferfish, visiting the facility, at the time (unconfirmed).
PHYSICAL FEATURES  Unnatural beauty: An incredibly buxom and enchanting woman. Lightly tanned skin, long black hair in ringlets, and excitable hazel eyes. Covered in ersatz freckles*.
PERSONALITY QUIRKS  Charming but entitled: She knows what people want to hear and effectively leverages this. After escaping from the CGC lab she greatly values freedom and fun. Due to her looks she is able to get what she wants more often than not.  Protective yet belligerent: She works well with team members she has bonded with, usually through her “makeover” sessions. She is aggressive and will quickly start or join a fight. Requires gentle guidance and camaraderie from her team members.
FAVOURED GEAR

Beguiling dress
Pointed metal feather hair stick
Atchisson AA-12 automatic combat shotgun

PRIMAL STATS  JAWS:+2 | EYES:0 | LIMBS:-1 | NERVES:+1
PRIMAL ABILITIES  Turkey: Hybridised with a Turkey giving her unnatural beauty. She can understand and speak with birds of the Phasianidae family including Turkeys, Peacocks, and chickens⁂. Mitridatism: She builds an immunity to all poisons/venoms after one administration of it. Perfect for infiltrating events or organisations involved in alcohol or drugs whilst retaining her full faculties.
*Pluck marks from feathers that irregularly grow on her body  ⁂This does not change the intelligence of the bird

title: PAAR: AVOW
text:
MISSION  ATTEMPTED ASSASSINATION OF THE VEILED AT THE OPULENT WEDDING
MISSION LOCATION  WEDDING VENUE AT █████████████████ ON THE RUBY RIVER, MONTANA, USA
MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED  1429, 04 JAN 1990 - 0245, 06 JAN 1990
CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE  ████████████████████████████ - 20 DEC 1989
REMARKS  We were offered both the protection detail and assassination jobs for this mission. Two members of the three person team voted for the protection gig. They aren’t necessarily fans of the client and their kind but they thought it would be awful if two brides died on their wedding day.
The following after action report was generated after debriefing the Mercenary VEILED NIGHTJAR on ███████████ at █████. FLUSTERED TURKEY flew the coop and the less time I spend with the wizard, CRACKED BATFISH, the better.
The team arrived at the wedding venue the day before the wedding. The ladies/birds (NIGHTJAR & TURKEY) were disguised as bridesmaids (one for each of the brides) whilst BATFISH infiltrated the venue as staff. Incognito, to not interrupt the special day, they aimed to discover and stop any assassination attempts of either or both of the brides.
THE KING  The first assassin to stop was ███████████, a Camera Obscura Shutterbug codenamed THE KING. She infiltrated as a silver adorned guest performing card tricks and gossiping. She is a well known celebrity and even amongst her ilk is known to be especially glittery.
To start the investigation NIGHTJAR, ever the professional, discovered from her fellow bridesmaids that one of the wedding rings had gone missing. Blending in with the crowds and gathering intel their prime culprit became ███████████ aka THE KING. TURKEY lured her away from the crowds into the brides’ matrimonial bedroom. I say bedroom but it was in fact an entire house made of ice, supposedly fashioned off a hotel in Sweden. Whilst in the ice cabin TURKEY found the ring on THE KING’s wedding finger, covered by a specially designed silver ring.
TURKEY signalled to NIGHTJAR, hiding outside, to grab the ring with her teleporting yoink ability. As TURKEY kept THE KING busy, NIGHTJAR brought the ring to BATFISH who immediately recognised the Midas curse on it. With his advice they eliminated THE KING to remove said curse.
Turns out THE KING was Queen Hermodike II, the wife of King Midas, ungoldified in modern times. She was able to curse gold items with the midas touch by wearing them. After a certain amount of time the item would absorb enough of cursed energy from her to become a gold mine*. After she takes it off the next time it is adorned the wearer is goldified.
After the assassination-free ceremony everyone congregated outside. Wedding guests marvelled at an incredible figure skating performance⁂ and a new mysterious golden statue in its centre. It depicted a queen reaching out for the future with a hand missing its pinky finger. I’m sure they had fun theorising whose wedding gift it was.
THE ANTIDOTER  The second threat was █████████████████████, another Shutterbug codenamed THE ANTIDOTER. As we were previously offered the assassination job I knew the client wanted the brides killed either at the altar, during their first dance, or when they consummate their wedding. Very cruel but at least we knew our clients were safe during the dinner.
The team carried out a three prong attack. TURKEY tested all the food and found it all to be poisoned through its taste. Yet it seemed to have no effect. BATFISH, disguised as a waiter, found out that one of the cake team had died. They had found the body in a smoky freezer. So it was up to the team’s doctor, NIGHTJAR, to quickly figure out the cause of death. She discovered that he had died of an extremely deadly poison. However, he was the only victim thus far.
Thankfully one of the three core rules of Camera Obscura is “Do not kill, harm, or kidnap any civilians except the target during a mission unless the client allows it”⏺, they had not. With some good cop/bad cop by TURKEY and NIGHTJAR🛆 they narrowed in on the culprit, █████████████████████ aka THE ANTIDOTER. Hidden on his body they found a 2 part poison. Each part is harmless by itself but deadly when consumed within 4 hours of each other. One part was in all the food except the cake and the other part was in the cake. The two birds were elated but too late they realised the wedding cake was gone.
What was meant to happen was that the brides would have eaten some cake and then left to quickly get changed for their first dance. They would come back and perform the death waltz. Thankfully, BATFISH figured there must be an antidote. During NIGHTJAR and TURKEY’s interrogations he was casting a ritual♢ in the fridge with the body. He determined the smoke, in the smoky freezer, had the antidote in it. THE ANTIDOTER had tried but failed to save his accidental victim.
Looking at the event timetable BATFISH found the smoke machine’s activation time had been changed. Instead of it activating as the brides returned for their first dance it was now set to activate just after they left to change. To prevent any issues he set it off as the brides were cutting into their cake. They looked furious at the shoddy time keeping but when one of them recognised BATFISH at the smoke machine she claimed she’d ordered it as a fun surprise so they all laughed it off.
The team captured THE ANTIDOTER and I recruited him. He accepted. He knew Camera Obscura would be unhappy with him due to the failure and the accidental death of a civilian. He’s a great chef on top of a great poisoner and even better antidoter.
The first dance was very moving with a live performance by Gaia’s wreath. Of course being a super fancy party means they also got live performances of rock & metal bands such as Big Bismuth, Erupted Scars, and Hupselosα.
THE SILHOUETTE  The third threat was a lot more direct. After most of the guests had left the brides retreated to their matrimonial ice cabin in the back of the compound. The stillness of the night was interrupted by bangs from the front gate. THe normal security went to intercept but my team stayed to protect our ice queens.
Four combatants emerged over the back walls, climbing down from branch suspending ropes. They were quick and tactical but my team was prepared. With FAMAS F1s the assassins opened fire on my intercepting team. One assassin’s rope broke, his helmet fell off, a massive rock met his head, and he was accidentally shot by one of his team mates. One down from BATFISH’s bad luck.
The remaining three rushed to the building, seemingly not caring for their lives, just the mission. NIGHTJAR intercepted one, both dipping and diving between various boulders in a well placed rock garden. Bullets on rocks, boots on pebbles, and hot breath into the winter air. The assassin couldn’t get a bead until he could. Light shone off his visor as he looked up at the boulder perched NIGHTJAR. He shot but his trigger finger only felt air. Confused he watched his trigger drop out of NIGHTJAR’s left hand as her right hand pulled her own. She’d intentionally lured him into a lit location to yoink his trigger. Second down.
On top of rifle shots the periodic destructive boom of TURKEY’s shotgun could be heard. After a final shot she screamed about going into the forest to find the source but warned the fourth was heading to the cabin. BATFISH and NIGHTJAR tried to catch up with the last assassin but he was too far ahead. NIGHTJAR couldn’t use her yoink ability so quickly again and even if she could it was deathly dark. Continue the chase or try to shoot a fast moving target in with her pistol? NIGHTJAR decided to run. BATFISH slipped in his slippers. TURKEY disappeared.
With a burst of mystical adrenaline NIGHTJAR suddenly sped up. She heard an energising chant from behind, but with no breath for thanks she flew on.
The assassin reached the house. He rammed through the door, shattering it like…. well like ice. He zigged and zagged down hallways following the sound of the rock music the brides so enjoyed. As he barged in ready to fire he hesitated, seeing three women rather than two. In his momentary trance NIGHTJAR shot him from below the chin, bullet stopped by the inside of his helmet. The brides, unfazed, let out an excited yell as NIGHTJAR fell into a figurative steaming heap.
But how had NIGHTJAR got to the room first? She’d sneaked in through a secret escape hatch she’d found during THE KING capture and elimination, much faster than the twisting corridors. It pays to be prepared and know your surroundings.
After the combat the bodies of the assassins were found. They seemed to be normal citizens from the surrounding area. By all intents they were average people, no crimes, average grades in school. The only thing that linked them was that they were all so average.
At least that’s the official report I got. Thankfully we were able to get NIGHTJAR to help in the autopsies. All was average except their eyes. They all had the eyes of Nyxmera. Each of them had a right eye of blue scleraβ with a yellow iris, like the sun on a blue sky. On the other eye they each had black sclera with an iris of grey and purple, like the two moons in the night sky. Literal eyes of Nyxmera.
Whoever lead the last set of assassins is not a shutterbug. I have no other information about them, though someone must know something otherwise they would not have redacted that part in the official autopsy report I got. They probably paid Camera Obscura for the first 2 attempts and tried to finish the job when THE KING and THE ANTIDOTER failed. What I do know from NIGHTJAR is that the eyes of the 4 assassins were all identical pairs. They were all exactly the same shape, size, and most importantly exactly the same iris patterns. Not much to go on, I’ll have to keep… an eye out.
CLOSING REMARKS
A successful mission with our clients going to lead a happy life together. Considering the danger involved my team of three did very well. Unfortunately TURKEY hasn’t been seen again since she went went to investigate the source of these eyes. She may have been recruited by Camera Obscura or the unknown other party. She voted to take the assassination job rather than the prevention mission so maybe she didn’t like taking a protection gig. It’s a weird thought that a turkey would want to live in the USA.
MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS  ████████████████████ - VEILED NIGHTJAR - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - FLUSTERED TURKEY - MIA  ████████████████████ - CRACKED BATFISH - ACTIVE
*As in the explosive kind of mine, it’s a pun  ⁂Blanchard the Hyperborean was part of the figure skating performance. I love his action movies especially the Copper Cog Warrior series  ⏺The other two are “Do not kill, harm, or kidnap any other Camera Obscura shutterbugs” and “Non-shutterbug mercenaries, bodyguards, and vigilantes can be eliminated with discretion”  ♢They say this but I think it was more bad cop/worse cop  🛆More predictable than his spells but take longer apparently  αLucky buggers  βNightjar told me to use the proper names but for people like me: sclera is the white of the eys, iris is the coloured part, and pupil is the black part

title: McCool News: 06 Jan 1990
text:
THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 6TH JANUARY 1990
Well doesn’t that sound grand. A Si señor opened locally to me, I’ll just have to find someone to go with.
Good afternoon, I’m Maggie McCool and you’re listening to McCool FM. We’re all slowly waking up from the new year and so there is not too much going on.
Saying that we had our first high profile wedding of the decade yesterday. River Dullcoin, daughter of Marian Dullcoin, and River Ox, olympic gold winning figure skater and coach, were married yesterday. The picture and coverage show a beautiful venue by the Ruby River with homages to Tartarus and Proteus. What I would have given to have been a fly on that wall.
The Biways and ERA, The European & Russian Alliance, are still in discussions for a new trade deal. We at the Biways, that is the British Isles, Greenland, Iceland, and other islands, have always benefited from being a small neutral nation separate from the five major superpowers. However, our government intends to leverage our abundance of nuclear power and research to get us a favourable deal. A deal with the global trade hub would be beneficial.
Repairs are still underway from the damages of the new year’s quake in Cambridgeshire.
{CONTINUE THIS}

title: PAAR: DEBT
text:
MISSION  DRUG EXCHANGE on A BRIDGE TONIGHT
MISSION LOCATION  █████████████████████████████ ON L’OISE (RIVER), NORTH OF THE FORMER FRENCH CAPITAL PARIS, FRANCE, ERA (EUROPEAN AND RUSSIAN ALLIANCE)
MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED  2004, 16TH JAN 1990 - 0345, 17TH JAN 1990
CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE  TAG (THE ARROWS OF GAIA)- 16TH JAN 1990
REMARKS 
MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS  ████████████████████ - VEILED NIGHTJAR - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - CRACKED BATFISH - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - FLASHBANG SQUIRREL - KIA  ████████████████████ - SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - LANCED BULL - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - BLINK HARE - ACTIVE 
In DEBT: Drug Exchange on a Bridge Tonight, our mercs decided to represent TAG, eco warriors, to purchase some of the illicit drug Holy water. They met up with the sellers from Triton & Delta on a bridge over the Oise, North of Paris. Otto, the seller, demanded £50K rather than the agreed £40K but with some negotiation including crying by the pathetic Flashbang, the mercs managed to make the initial trade. Unfortunately, that’s when the Kraken Slagger, Dross, arrived demanding all the goods. With some mind reading assisted blackmail Nuke was able to give Dross the money whilst they escaped with the Holy Water.
This led to a chase with cars, motorcycles, and speedboats along the river. With a sharp breaking of his car, Cracks flung Dross onto the team’s boat, helmed by Truffle. Blink dodged a battering ram with quick shrinking, Wolf crushed a pursuing motorcyclist with reckless driving, and Midnight failed to blow up a car with a flare gun.
With Dross firing his fiery Bren LMG at Truffle, Truffle decided the only way would be to crash his boat into an upcoming bridge, flinging them both onto it. Cracks capatilised on this by crashing his car onto the bridge killing himself, Dross, and Flashbang in a fiery explosion. Truffle was flung into the river and Cracks miraculously emerged unscathed except for a broken amulet. RIP the pathetic Flashbang.

title: McCool News: 04 Feb 1990
text:
THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 4TH FEBRUARY 1990
Due to the new year’s earthquake a new entrance to the DOT, Domain of Tartarus opened up near the town of Warboys. The entrance was unknown until yesterday when Raiders from the DOT attacked and pillaged the village. The military are now on the scene.
Kraken is opening up a controversial new oil pipeline that travels through the Black forest in Germany. The eco warrior/terrorist group, The Arrows of Gaia, also known as TAG, had publicly marked the project with their famous slogan “TAG, you’re it”. However, nothing appeared to come of their threat.
{CONTINUE THIS}

title: McCool People: Blanchard the Hyperborean
text:
McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Blanchard the Hyperborean, 18th August 1990, 11.00 a.m.
Maggie McCool: Before I get to the interview please let me say how proud I am of this radio station show and how far it has progressed in so little time. We have had such big names but none bigger than today’s. Welcome to McCool Blanchard the Hyperborean.
Blanchard the Hyperborean: It is a pleasure. I have really enjoyed the show. Such interesting guests I didn’t want people to miss out on me.
MM: I’m flattered, thank you. For those who don’t know of the many feats of Blanchard the Hyperborean please indulge me in listing them. He is an Austrian born american film star, polar and cryogenics researcher, governor of British Colombia in the USA, successful entrepreneur, multiple gold medal winter olympics winner and much more. How does a man in their 40s have so much energy and outcompete other athletes in their 30s?
BH: As hard as it is to believe I am in my 40s. But to answer your question I live a healthy and relaxing life in the cold. I love Vancouver with its cold and ice and snow. Its stillness lets me go with the flow at a leisurely pace. Though a leisurely pace for me is fast for others.
MM: It does look like a lovely city in the winter though a bit nippy for me. We know you helped make Vancouver a big city for movies with some calling it the Hollywood of the North.
BH: Please I like to call Hollywood the dry Vancouver.
MM: I love it. If it is ok I wanted to briefly talk about your hometown in Austria. What was it like and do you regret what happened to it?
BH: My upbringing in Seefeld in Tirol was adequate. It was a small village but my friends and I did enjoy skiing on the nearby mountains. However, I outgrew it as did ERA, The European and Russian alliance. The super nation decided to abandon most inland settlements and focus the populations in existing and new port cities on the coasts. Practical but with all the different cultures combining together there was going to be problems with integrating everyone. A big reason they did this was to allow the war torn country to be reclaimed by nature, however deep hatred between different countries still existed.
MM: How did they manage?
BH: Lots of tactics but the main one was to make the shared culture of ERA come from outside, specifically American culture. Some will say it made ERA too easily swayed by outside culture but it’s what made me love American movies. I got my chance to enter the movies after making a splash in the 1980 winter olympics at Lake Placid in New York. From there everything just went my way.
MM: Speaking of, it was horrible what happened to many of your fellow members of The Pharos club but congratulations on becoming its new leader.
BH: It was horrible, I had many friends there and was initially sad I could not make the get together due to the press tour of Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy versus the roaches from outer space. Of course now I’m relieved and hope to continue the club and finally find the home of Proteus, unfortunately its as elusive as ever. By the way, what did you think of my directorial debut of Blondie and Scaly-man-thing-guy?
MM: Amazing! It really brought it back to its roots and I loved the action. I’m sad it’s the last film of the franchise but so happy it ended in such a poignant, emotional, and bombastic manner.
BH: Great it sound like it would be suited for you and that Pat guy. I felt like you two would make a cute couple.
MM: Yes we do… anyway, you have so many projects going on. Is there any on the horizon we should be specifically keeping an eye out for?
BH: Yes, I have a big project I have been working on behind the scenes. It’s well under way. I’m going to Hong Kong for the next step and the whole world will see the fruition of our plans before the end of the new year.
MM: Our plans? Are other important people working for you in this project?
BH: No, I’m working for an important genius for this project.
[END OF EXCERPT]

title: McCool People: Dr. Petra Pufferfish
text:
McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Dr. Petra Pufferfish, 22nd April 1990, 11.00 a.m.
Maggie McCool: Well, that was a bit disparaging wasn’t it? Anyway, it’s the 5th of April 1990, you’re listening to McCool FM and I’m your host Maggie McCool. Today we have a special guest, Dr. Petra Pufferfish. Previous head scientist of The Centre for Genomics and Cloning. Thanks for joining us today Petra.
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: Hello, and please call me by my full name and title, Dr. Petra Pufferfish.
MM: Oh, I am very sorry Dr. Petra Pufferfish.
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: Apology accepted Mag.
MM: Right, well let’s first address the rumors that you died in 1989 and why you have only resurfaced now.
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: Greatly exaggerated rumor as you can tell. My ex-colleague Rang thought he saw me die and spread some distasteful rumors that I was just a head in a jar, fabrications. I’ve only re emerged now to introduce my new business venture called The Positive Pan Plan
MM: Was that Dr. Ranga Doshi from the CGC?
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: Yes Mag. That is Rang from the Centre for Genomics and Cloning. But back to what is important. As you know I am the Primeval Polytheist. I am the only human blessed by all four of the deities. I am the only person they can all agree on and so I am the number one Gaian in the world.
MM: Yes, that is quite an amazing feat. Somehow getting Nyxmera and Tartarus to agree with something is a huge accomplishment.
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: Thank you. So the Centre for Genomic Cloning was not enough for me. I am forming a new business and that business is the world. I already have Blanch and Sol on board as well as many others. They all believe in my eminence.
MM: Yes, your initial funding is the highest of any venture capital ever. Congratulations. However, with the recent theft of the Koh-i-Noor from the British museum some are questioning human ownership. It was afterall stolen by a Talos, an aspect of tartarus. What do you make of this?
Dr. Petra Pufferfish: We can of course own things from each other but if a deity wants something that belongs to them, they will have it.
[end of excerpt]

title: PuMP: SUBSONIC HYDRA
text:
BACKGROUND  A cheetah, peregrine falcon, and marlin all in one. He loves all fast vehicles* except spacecrafts. He’s famous in various motor & water sports for his skills and personality. When testing an experimental vehicle he was chopped in half. He survived regrowing his bottom half whilst a new him grew from the bottom half. This has happened a few times. In this case the top half continued the famous life. The lower half decided to do something more dangerous and exciting; join PUML⁂.
PHYSICAL FEATURES  Blue racer: Adorned in racing leathers of cornflower blue. His jacket and trousers are covered in various sponsor badges◉. He wears a reinforced motorbike helmet covered in a decal of blue and white flames. A massive pointed metal boot encases his left foot and a normal boot his right♢.
PERSONALITY QUIRKS  Dependable but arrogant: Any task or mission I set to him he will carry out with no grumbles. He’s a good mercenary, having picked up all aspects of combat in his training with utmost haste. I would like to send him on lots of mission to make him better but he thinks he knows everything now. I fear he’ll only learn from disastrous mistakes if at all.  Quick yet absent-minded: He is a very active and fit person. Though exceptionally fast when in action he has a bad tendency to day dream during down time. Probably a form of energy conservation.
FAVOURED GEAR

Vehicle lock pick kit
Bag of tungsten carbide ball bearings
Spectre M4 Submachine gun

PRIMAL STATS  JAWS:0 | EYES:-2 | LIMBS:+2 | NERVES:+1
PRIMAL ABILITIES  Hydral regeneration: He has amazing regeneration abilities. Small wounds may take minutes but loss of body parts can take months in a coma with nutrient tubes. Its all because of his incredible stem cellsΔ. He has two special but identical stem cell producing organs: one in his head and the other in his left foot. If a body part isn’t directly connected to one of the organs it won’t regenerate. Strangely his left foot clone will be a perfect copy of the original from when the separation occurred, memories and all.  Kinetic transfer: When touching an item he can increase its speed up to 342m/sα. When it leaves his touch this effect stops with the item decelerating normally.
*Brilliant having someone who can pilot/drive pretty much any vehicle ⁂He claims its just one of him doing missions for us, i’m sceptical but its hard to tell whether he’s being deceitful or just forgetful ◉Most prominently one for PUML ♢I’ve told him this makes his weak points obvious but he pretends to not listen ΔCells that can become various other cells and duplicate a tonne α343 m/s is the speed of sound, therefore 342m/s and below is subsonic

title: The Primeval Deities and you: ep1 Overview
text:
Hello listener and welcome to the first episode of The Primeval Deities and you. I am Dr. Harmon Atriti, lecturer of Primeval studies at The University of Cambridge, and your eager host. In this series we will explore the four Primeval deities and their influence on our world. In this episode we will answer a few foundational questions to set us on the correct path.
What are the Primeval Deities?  The Primeval Deities are all encompassing yet mysterious entities. There is no question of their existence and all other deities either do not exist or are inconsequential.
The Primeval Deities are the sky, earth, water, and life of our reality. They influence us as our collective consciousness shapes them. In this way humanity and divinity entangle as we reach out for one another.
Who are the Primeval Deities?  There are four Primeval Deities.  Nyxmera, the two faced deity of sky and space. An envious and vicarious being; its eyes the stars, sun, and moons.  Tartarus, the encaged deity of the earth. Its struggles against Nyxmera feed its anger and greed.  Proteus, the free flowing deity of water. It mixes easily with the others and welcomes any and all changes.  Gaia, the unifying entity of life. A charming leader with the nigh impossible goal of uniting the Primeval deities. 
When did the Primeval Deities come about?  The whole world learnt of the influence of the Primeval Deities after the 6th of August 1945. This was caused by the first and only atomic bombing of an occupied city, Hiroshima. Whether the deities existed beforehand, or came to be due to the event is in hot debate amongst the academic community.
Who worships the Primeval Deities?  The Biways is primarily an apathetic nation. Although the existence of the Primeval deities is not disputed we, as a nation, do not find benefit in worshipping any of them. Of course there are still some who worship or study the deities in The Biways.  Nyxmera’s admirers are called Suns of Nyxmera. They want to entertain the ever watching Nyxmera and be entertained themselves. Many actors and physics researchers are Suns. The SAE’s, Supreme Asian Empire, and the Mooner’s primary deity is Nyxmera.  Tartarus’ loyalists are called Dotter of Tartarus. They hold personal freedoms as sacrosanct, taking what they can. Many miners and CEOs are Dotters. The CAC’s, Coalition of African Countries, primary deity is Tartarus.  Proteus’ supporters are called Proteans. They are laid back and tend to go with the flow. Many of those working by and on water are Proteans. The ERA’s, The European & Russian Alliance, primary deity is Proteus.  Gaia’s followers are called Gaians. They believe in unification, yet they can’t agree on the method. Gaians tend to work in life or social sciences with many doctors and politicians. The USA’s, United States of America, primary deity is Gaia.  The last super nation, Oceania, has no single primary deity. Instead they worship all the deities and are described as polytheist.
That is a quick introduction to our four Primeval deities. I am eternally grateful for you lending your ears. We will go into detail on all the topics introduced in this episode through the coming months. The next episode will focus on that ever watching deity, Nyxmera. I look forward to seeing you then dear listener.
crumbs: The Primeval Deities and you: ep1 Overview

title: News story: McCool FM announcement
text:
A McCool new radio station signals a new decade
by Kirtsy Sherman
It’s the final month of 1989 and The Biways is getting a new radio station: McCool FM.
McCool FM will run a cornucopia of shows. From ordinary affairs such as the news and dramas. To stand out it’ll also include an interview show called “McCool People” and an educational show about the Primeval Deities called “The Primeval Deities and you”. Between all that excitement they’ll run popular, folk, and popular folk music.
The Ambitious radio channel will make its home atop the water tower on Rivey hill overlooking Linton. The Art Deco tower, built in 1935 to 36, now modified with a high powered radio will be able to broadcast to the entire Biways and further.
We talked to Maggie McCool, the founder and primary host of MCCool FM, on her ambitions. She said:
“McCool FM’s going to be a household name! At least that’s what I need to tell myself. It would be mad to do all I’ve done if it wasn’t my goal. With the station I want to let everyone know what is going on in our great and interesting world. Some might accuse me of controlling a narrative with my bias. That’s true, but I need to let my personality inform the channel or else it’ll be bland radio channel number 8. I hope everyone will enjoy listening. Selfishly I’m eager to meet a variety of people with my interview show McCool people. It’s nice to think I’ll be a bit like Nyxmera, watching over the world from up high.”
Will listeners tune into McCool FM like its radio looks over Linton? Or will it merge into the fuzz of background radiation?
Maybe their recently announced intro for Maggie will give us an idea:
“McCool in name, McCool in nature, it’s your host Maggie McCool on McCool FM!”

title: McCool FM 14:00 News Script
text:
THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 31ST DECEMBER 1989
Good afternoon everyone, It’s Maggie McCool. It’s the 31st of December 1989 and this is the first ever 2pm McCool news.
Happy new year and welcome to McCool FM. I hope you are looking forward to the new decade and its promises. I also hope you’re prepared for the inevitable chaos and madness that this world regularly gifts us.
But first let’s think back to the past. Many remembrance services are being taken worldwide to remember all those lost to the horrors of world war 2. The brave soldiers, the concentration camp victims, all those taken by the kaiju infestation of Japan, and more.
From the scorched and cracked earth peace took root and hasn’t let go. The super nations have maintained the nuclear arms ban and only minor skirmishes have taken place since 1945. We wish the mooners luck in their future plans of reclaiming their homeland of Japan.
In this special report we’ll cover the major news highlights of this waning decade. Including:
The first artificial cloning of a mammal by Dr. Petra Pufferfish of the CGC. This was followed by her disappearance with Dr. Rangi Doshi, previous COO, taking her place as CEO.
The rise of the illicit drug “Holy water”. Its rapid spread throughout the world is unprecedented and many think related to the powers of Proteus.
The destruction of Laser-US, a space station designed to save us from apocalyptic asteroids. The only survivor was Sol the ablated. The other asteroid deflection space stations are still under progress including the Las-ERA, Laser-CAC, La-Sae, and Laser-Oceania.
In a first scoop for McCool FM we’ll also talk about the earthquake we just felt in our Cambridgeshire studio. It was quite fierce!

title: PuMP: CRACKED BATFISH
text:
BACKGROUND  He claims to be a time travelling wizard. He’s made tonnes of claims but a few are:

He was an apprentice sage in Atlantis and escaped as it was sinking
He shared a picnic on the grey moon with pink mouse like aliens
He pulled Excalibur out of a rock but exchanged it for some water lilies with the lady of the lake
He fought a sentient machine that was turning a world of forests into books
He was tortured by the sanctity of time bureau and dropped in 1974, his time travelling abilities removed

I think he’s so crazy they are either all false or all true.
PHYSICAL FEATURES  Spaced wizard: He dresses like a mage but with modern clothing. Fluffy purple bathrobe, hotel slippers, and a fedora plastered with gold star stickers. He’s surprisingly spry for an emaciated old man. Has a thousand-yard stare, or would that be a thousand-year stare?
PERSONALITY QUIRKS  Wise but deranged: He’s rarely wrong when talking about magic, not that he talks about much else. I should rephrase, it’s the only thing he talks about that seems to make sense, magic being nonsensical in its unnature*.  Anarchic yet nihilistic: Thankfully for PUML he likes to topple the towers of those who think themselves so high above the rest. Unfortunately he has no care for himself and little for those around him.
FAVOURED GEAR

Hand mirror
Cat charm with 8 scratch marks
An unbreakable twig⁂

PRIMAL STATS  JAWS:0 | EYES:-1 | LIMBS:0 | NERVES:+3
PRIMAL ABILITIES  Sorcery: He can cast magic but has no control over what spell he will cast. Supposedly an effect of the time bureau’s limitation they placed on him.  O-man◉: For whatever reason he seems to cause misfortune/bad luck to those around him. Great when it effects enemies♢.
*Unnature is to unnatural as nature is to natural; don’t bother looking it up in the dictionary  ⁂He claims it can cast magic missiles though he’s cagey about the details and won’t provide a demonstration  ◉As in he’s a man and bad omen, not that he’s from Oman  ♢Horrible when it effects alliesΔ  ΔProbably deserved when it effects himself

title: McCool News: 7th Dec 1990
text:
BREAKING NEWS AT 1517 ON MONDAY 7TH DECEMBER 1990
MAGGIE MCCOOL It’s Maggie McCool and this is McCool FM. This is a special report. A mouth to the DOT has opened in the White House lawn. Out emerged Taloes led by one with the Kohinor on its head, the british crown jewel. One such as it had never been seen. A combination of lava, obsidian, and radiation. If that wasn’t strange enough, Dr. Petra Pufferfish then emerged from the mouth, seemingly being escorted by the Taloes who left her as they descended once more, sealing the hole behind them. She commandeered the presidential address to give the following message.
DR. PETRA PUFFERFISH: Hello my world. I am Dr. Petra Pufferfish. Lead designer of the Perfect Pan Plan. Our first step to taking control of the world is to conquer the United States of America. Nothing personal it is just you are the most powerful nation but we will succeed. For the first step Blanch* will use his Far⁂ Powered Climate Manipulator to freeze the United States of America in Blizzards. To prevent this you must pay us 100 million dollars every day. Don’t worry we have so many more plans, it will take a titanic effort to stop us. That is all I need to say.
MAGGIE MCCOOL After her statement the guards went to apprehend her but a subsequent explosion left no sign of her or her would be capturers.
*Blanchard the Hyperborean ⁂Farrier the Brooding Horseshoe crab mutant

title: McCool People: Prof. Peadar Duignan
text:
McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Prof. Peadar Duignan, 18th February 1990, 11.00 a.m.
Maggie McCool: You’re listening to McCool FM and I’m your host Maggie McCool. Today we have a very relevant guest, Professor Peadar Duignan from University College Cork. He’s the Biway’s utmost expert on the DOT, having been there himself, and a Dotter of Tartarus which I won’t hold against him. Welcome Professor Duignan.
Peadar Duignan: Thanks for having me. We don’t need to stand to ceremony so please feel free to call me Peadar, Maggie. Additionally, I won’t hold it against you for being a Sun of Nyxmera.
MM: Oh I do miss that Irish sass. So, we have a new opening to the DOT in the Biways, from our latest reports it appears to have opened in an underground cave under the village of Warboys, not too far from our station actually. What can you tell us about The DOT and its opening Peadar?
PD: Thanks for setting up the foundation. As many people know Tartarus is the deity of the Earth, imprisoned by Nyxmera. In essence it is the planet Earth and is symbolised with cracks and openings.Below the ground and within the Earth is the DOT, The Domain Of Tartarus. Openings to the DOT look like circular black holes where no light enters or leaves, we call these the Jaws of Tartarus. It is imperative that you never enter unless you are prepared for the environment and you’re ready to never return.
MM: Is it true that time is weird in the DOT? I heard that when you emerged no time had passed on the surface even though years had passed for you.
PD: Not quite true. When I entered the DOT I was the last on my team to pass the precipice. Just as I was entering a person came out. He didn’t look like any of my team members even though he was wearing our expedition badge. It wasn’t till he spoke did I recognise myself. I knew by his tone that the rest of my team wouldn’t… hadn’t made it out but I could also tell he had no regrets so I descended into the gullet of my deity.
MM: Wow! If I ever had the chance to go to space and properly gaze at the stars, the eyes of Nyxmera, I also think I would leap at the opportunity. We’ll get more to the details of your journey later but first can you tell us of the various dangers. The military locked down the village after DOT raiders attacked and pillaged it and then we saw some lava emerge on the surface. What other threats could possibly come from The DOT?
PD: Before I get to other threats I would like to address the DOT raiders if I may Maggie.
MM: Of course Peadar.
PD: DOT raiders are humans that live in the DOT. They are all Dotters of Tartarus as non believers do not last long. Their tools, vehicles and dwellings are bolted together from scrap and they believe in the free market.
MM: As in no economic regulation and the price of goods are based on supply and demand?
PD: That is the free market that many surface Dotters aim to benefit from. No, those in the DOT believe everything is free if you can take it. It’s a brutal and sometimes cruel society down there. However, so is the environment. Everyone does what they can to survive including mutating. I saw someone with 2 heads once and another person with tentacles for arms.
MM: What causes this mutagenic effect?
PD: No one is quite sure, more research is needed. I believe it is caused by all the hazardous waste dumped into the DOT in combination with the powers bestowed by Tartarus. One of the biggest known jaws is in The Big Hole Dump yard in Kimberley, South Africa in The Coalition of African Countries. They have a special Kaiju prevention system. If they didn’t, an incredibly large kaiju could surface, rivalling those in Japan.
MM: Seems there is a lot of danger in the DOT. We know DOT raiders can and have reached the surface. Instead of coming up and taking our stuff why don’t they just live up here when or if they get here?
PD: Why do capitalists extract wealth from the poor? They are good questions and I aim to find out through my studies. People grow up doing what they know. Sure Raiders could live up here and work. Sure CEOs could pay taxes and give money to charities as well. But for many people it’s easier to live a hard stressful life than learn to change.
MM: And here I thought philosophy was for Gaians but as they would say, we are multitude. Aside from DOT raiders, what other dangers could we see on the surface?
PD: Well of course we could get kaiju. These are bestial creatures, generally a incredibly large version of an animal living or extinct with some kind of peculiarity. An insect kaju would be the size of a dog or cow and a cat kaiju would be the size of a bus or building. They are covered in red cracks and always have a large obsidian orb on them. Normally something weird happens around the orb, commonly something being duplicated. A common kaiju is the Scorpius, giant scorpions with an obsidian orb at the base of their two tails. They are deadly to others and themselves. I hated eating them.
MM: I’m taking it that no normal animals live down there?
PD: Not much, just small things like bugs, lizards, rats etc. Interestingly many of the kaiju seen in the DOT have normal animal counterparts down there. The relation between these two are hotly debated so I’ll leave the topic of kaiju at that for now so I don’t anger any fellow DOT researchers, we’re a fiery bunch.
MM: Very interesting, I thought I knew all there was to know about kaiju but you’ve taught me something new. Would you like to talk about your journey?
PD: Oh yes, I documented a new type of Talos. The paper just got published so I can talk about it. For those unaware a Talos, Taloes for plural, is a sentient creature consisting of minerals. They are hard to find and generally very dangerous so hard to study. We knew of exploding blobs made of lithium, large columns like Taloes made of local ores, and even one consisting of a radioactive gem that can project some sort of body.
MM: From my understanding many see these as the avatars of Tartarus. Similar to the Starvatars of Nyxmera, The Water bodies of Proteus, or the Life forms of Gaia.
PD: Indeed. Well, I discovered what I dubbed an Obsidian lava Talos. I was confused as it appeared to be a Talos made of lava and of Obsidian. It’s mostly unheard of that a Talos is made from more than one mineral. Through diligent study I discovered that the lava and obsidian were one in the same. They can actively change their lava to obsidian and vice versa. They can also absorb more lava if they wish. It’s remarkable.
MM: That does sound very cool. WHat do you intend to do next?
PD: I have more funding now to go on another exhibition. This time we’ll have a guard detail and a camera crew. They want us to make a documentary!
[end of excerpt]

title: Emergency broadcast system: Warboys DOT opening
text:
Warning! This is not a test! This is addressed to the citizens of Warboys.
An entrance to the DOT has opened to the Northeast. DOT dwellers have emerged. Evacuate immediately. Do not pack any belongings. Once you have gathered your household members leave immediately. Do not wait for or collect anyone from another household.
Evacuate south to the Johnson’s of old Hurst farm. DO not enter the building labelled “The Crocodile house”. Exit Warboys via the Church road. Do not exit via the New Road.
Ensure your car radio is set to McCool FM for further updates.
crumbs: Emergency broadcast system: Warboys DOT opening

title: McCool People: Sol
text:
McCool FM - Interview Transcript  Maggie McCool-Sol, 21st January 1990, 11.00 a.m.
Maggie McCool: You’re listening to McCool FM and I’m your host Maggie McCool. Today we have a very special guest, Sol, the sole survivor of the Laser-US space station. They’re a devout Sun of Nyxmera and they are touring their new book “Sol the Ablated”. Welcome Sol.
S: Happy to be here Maggie McCool.
MM: Now Sol we all know that Nyxmera called down the asteroid that killed the dinosaurs because it was bored. As a Sun of Nyxmera myself, I was wondering why you helped create a method to stop these asteroids if they are the will of Nyxmera.
S: Quite simply to entertain Nyxmera. If Nyxmera really wants us gone it can call down thousands of asteroids until one clears us off the face of the earth. Nyxmera could stop containing Tartarus and let it engulf us in lava. There are so many ways to exterminate us. I don’t pretend to understand its intentions but I think it is safe to say we are entertaining Nyxmera through our struggles. It is not done with us yet and we should be grateful.
MM: Well you have convinced me! As you allude to, many like to personify the Primeval deities when they are anything but human. Next I believe you are going to read an excerpt from your book Sol.
S: Yes, thank you. I will begin. As the most interesting and exciting person I know…
[end of excerpt]
Talks about how heat is an issue and capacitors are not good enough to output enough electricity for an ablation laser. THey did not like how the military was looking into their technology.

title: PuMP: VEILED NIGHTJAR
text:
BACKGROUND  A medical doctor whose mentor was Dr. Moira Finn. They were both known to go above and beyond for their patients. Eventually Dr. Finn died of a heart attack, stroke, and infection caused by a bad tooth she should have seen the dentist about. NIGHTJAR was present and tried but failed to save her. Dr. Finn’s other mentees used this as an opportunity to put the blame on NIGHTJAR who lost her medical license due to “misconduct”. Not able to help others through medicine, she decided to do so as a mercenary with PUML.
PHYSICAL FEATURES  Monochrome medic: She’s the dictionary definition of a goth doctor. Short perfectly manicured black nails and a black band t-shirt of Not our dames. Her smoky eye makeup is impeccable. Yet it could never be dark enough to cover her periorbital hyperpigmentation*.
PERSONALITY QUIRKS  Adaptable but disconnected: Due to her experience as a doctor in ER she can lead a team, create a plan, and quickly pivot when the circumstances change. Unfortunately she also speaks like a doctor, frequently confusing enemies and team mates alike.  Meticulous yet blunt: If given time she likes to prepare with an extreme level of methodical research and planning. However, when she’s in the action she loves to start blasting and smashing.
FAVOURED GEAR

Medical kit
Baseball bat
Walther P88 semiautomatic pistol

PRIMAL STATS  JAWS:0 | EYES:0 | LIMBS:+2 | NERVES:+1
PRIMAL ABILITIES  Yoink: She can teleport items into her hands. The three stipulations are:

The item must fit on her palm
She must be able to directly see or touch the item⁂
This skill has a refractory period of a few minutes

Perfect landing: She can seemingly land on her feet, with no injury, from any height. With this skill and her general acrobatics she is a master at traversing over and around obstacles.
*Dark circles under the eyes generally caused by fatigue  ⁂Having a concealed weapon that she can directly teleport into her hand is handy

title: McCool News: 07 Jul 1990
text:
THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 7TH July 1990
The annual gathering of the Pharos club ended in tragedy as their airship crashed over Siberia and has yet to be found. The few survivors who couldn’t attend are in the midst of determining the new leader before they reconvene their search for the home of the deity Proteus.

title: Commercial: Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy versus the roaches from outer space
text:
1990 McCool FM - :60 second spot

Scaly-man-thing-guy: I love how beams reflect off your immaculately bald head, Blondie.
Blondie: I love how your eyes glow green with power, Scaly-man-thing-guy.
Scaly-man-thing-guy: Are you saying what I think you are saying?
Blondie: Yes, with my reflective chrome dome!
Scaly-man-thing-guy: And my radioactive death rays!
Together: We can disintegrate all our enemies and eat all the cockroaches we want!
ANNCR: This summer watch the finale of the Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy blockbuster franchise. From enemies, to friends, to enemies again will they finally become allies! Will they fight or flight as they encounter their greatest adversary, the Cockroach Empress in: Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy versus the Roaches from outer space!

https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-TIDY.html
In the last mission of Primeval Pummeling the team infiltrated a dump yard in South Africa. This is where cargo containers were dumped into the DOT. The team unwittingly stopped the Kaiju defences causing them to combat an entity consisting of 3 massive snakes combined by an obsidian orb. With mechs, a vorpal beheading, casualties, toppling a building, and a rod from god they vanquished the Python and successfully escaped. Next mission the team is off to Hong Kong to investigate an infestation of mutant Horseshoe crabs.

title: McCool News: 04 Mar 1990
text:
THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 4TH MARCH 1990
Heyo it’s Maggie McCool. You’re listening to the 2pm McCool news on the 4th of March 1990.
I hope you are all keeping warm in this chilly spring. In the news today we’ll cover:
A recent robbery at the University of Cambridge occurred recently. Witnesses say they saw an individual escaping the scene with a frozen head.
Citizens of the town of warboys are starting to repopulate their town after a horrendous DOT raider attack caused by the new year earthquake. Reconstruction has been swift due to Pumice construction.
The Royal Chambers Company are back on tour. An infamous company with unsavoury rumours surrounding them. Even so they are the best around and people are excited.
After the news we have a new McCool people. I’ll be interviewing leading CGC (Centre for Genomics and Cloning) scientist, Dr. Ranga Doshi. We’ll discuss the use of Horseshoe crabs in medical research.

title: PAAR: DELVE
text:
MISSION  DOT EXPEDITION LEADS TO VEIN ENCOUNTERS
MISSION LOCATION  WARBOYS, CAMBRIDGESHIRE, ENGLAND, BIWAYS
MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED  1429, 06 FEB 1990 - 1429, 06 MAR 1990
CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE  BIWAYS MILITARY - 05 FEB 1989
REMARKS 
Although coming out a month later our team spent less than a day of their time in the DOT. Could have been better but also could have been a lot worse.
MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS  ████████████████████ - VEILED NIGHTJAR - KIA  ████████████████████ - CRACKED BATFISH - ACTIVE  ████████████████████ - SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE - KIA 
VEILED NIGHTJAR killed by the obsidian blade of an Obsidian lava talos Writeup: Session writeups https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-DELVE.html Session 2 write up In DELVE our team of 3 mercenaries (Truffle, Nightjar, and Cracks) were ordered to converge on the town of Warboys, Cambridgeshire. They found it ransacked by DOT raiders, able to breach the surface due to an earthquake that had unveiled a cave system at the nearby extinct volcano.The team was tasked by the biways military with stopping any further raids by any means necessary. They entered the cave of Diorite, a magma based rock with a salt and pepper colour. Truffle decided to blindfold themself, allowing their sense of smell to lead the way. The rest of the team using the light of the ever present lava to guide theirs. They encountered living blobs of lithium which exploded in a chain reaction leading into a cave in. No choice but to go deeper the team encountered a sentient column of bismuth. With a heavy machine gun and warhammer it attacked only for Nightjar to steal its warhammer and smash it to pieces with a deadly somersault. Deeper they found the raider encampment, in a state due to the living rocks and lava. The Raider leader tried to parley but was swiftly dispatched by Truffle, hater of cheese eaters. The team was fighting hard and Cracks brought forth another pillar of lava, incinerating 2 raiders. However, this allowed a Talos made of lava and obsidian to emerge and strike down Nightjar, RIP. The team partnered with the raiders and took care of the Talos threat. Tremor, the raider’s magnetic slinger and Unicorn, a new PUML member, brought forth a peaceful resolution. It was time to kill the other Obsidian lava Taloes to stop them from reigniting the volcano and allow the raiders to go back into the DOT. In the reservoir chamber the Taloes sacrificed some humans and began their ritual. Truffle and Tremor tried to sneak around only for Cracks’ bad luck to cause some lava to erupt onto Tremor who shouted in pain. Tremor was immediately skewered by one of the Taloes’ Obsidian spears. Cracks tried to help only for his new Panzerschreck to miss the Taloes and hit his team member Truffle, RIP. With his second team kill in the bag Cracks was attacked by a Talos. To confuse the entity he changed himself into a squirrel. Literally flying into the scene with a parachute, Steam gazelle helped take care of the rest. With Unicorn using a flare gun as a distraction Cracks performed an ultra successful RPG shot in squirrel form to kill the last Talos. The leftover raiders rushed past them giving the team a buggy to escape the now collapsing cave. They rushed out with good driving and a smoke grenade wielding squirrel to bypass more Taloes. Up next was a jump over a river of lava. Steamy tried to use their parachute to allow the car to fly over only for them to sail off by themselves. However, with quick thinking Unicorn drove over a ramp and Steamy launched themselves over the bridge and back into the buggy. With a slo-mo explosion of lava they escaped the tunnel and were rewarded by the military with a decommissioned base and helicopter.

title: Commercial: Pumice construction
text:
1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

ANNCR:  Once your skyline was gray and blocky, too brutal for mortal eyes. Pumice construction came and saved the day. We created concrete buildings of flowing shapes and colours. With our patented concrete technology we created the post modern brutalist wave. Better yet we can reduce the concrete back to liquid so we can easily repair and modify. This created strong but flexible cities.
ANNCR: Our services are available to you. Pumice construction now creates residential buildings. Let us make your perfect home. Whether you want an extra floor, a basement, or even a pool our new patented concrete finish is gentle and smooth to the touch.
ANNCR: Pumice construction, buildings in a flash that last.
